member.name: T:FaceRecog.DisposableObject
member.summary: Represents a class which has managed or unmanaged resources.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.IsDisposed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance has been disposed.
member.returns: true if this instance has been disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.ThrowIfDisposed
member.summary: If this object is disposed, then is thrown.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.DisposeManaged
member.summary: Releases all managed resources.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.DisposeUnmanaged
member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this .

member.name: M:FaceRecog.DisposableObject.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this .
member.param: Indicate value whether method was called.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeEstimator
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to estimate human age from face image.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeEstimator.Groups
member.summary: Gets the collection of age group this estimator returns in derived classes.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeEstimator.RawPredict(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an index of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An index of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeEstimator.RawPredictProbability(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns probabilities of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeRange
member.summary: Represents a range that has start and end age.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeRange.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Instantiates a new instance with the specified starting and ending ages.
member.param: The inclusive age index of the range.
The exclusive end age of the range.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeRange.End
member.summary: Gets an age that represents the exclusive end of the range.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.AgeRange.Start
member.summary: Gets the inclusive start of the .

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.EmotionEstimator
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to estimate emotion from face image.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.EmotionEstimator.Labels
member.summary: Gets the collection of emotion label this estimator returns in derived classes.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EmotionEstimator.RawPredict(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EmotionEstimator.RawPredictProbability(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns probabilities of emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to detect human eye's blink base on eye aspect ratio (EAR).

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32[],System.Int32[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the threshold and eye point indices for left and right eyes.
member.param: The threshold to decide that left eye blinks or not.
The threshold to decide that right eye blinks or not.
The indices of left eye location to calculate eye aspect ratio.
The indices of right eye location to calculate eye aspect ratio.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.LeftEyePointIndices
member.summary: Gets the array of the indices of left eye location to be used calculating eye aspect ratio.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.LeftRatioThreshold
member.summary: Gets the threshold to decide that left eye blinks or not.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.RightEyePointIndices
member.summary: Gets the array of the indices of right eye location to be used calculating eye aspect ratio.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.RightRatioThreshold
member.summary: Gets the threshold to decide that right eye blinks or not.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.RawDetect(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{FaceRecog.FacePart,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint}},System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Detects the values whether human eye's blink or not from face landmark.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
When this method returns, contains true, if the left eye blinks; otherwise, false.
When this method returns, contains true, if the right eye blinks; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioBaseEyeBlinkDetector.GetEar(System.Collections.Generic.IList{FaceRecog.FacePoint},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Int32})
member.summary: Return an eye aspect ratio.
member.param: The collection of location corresponding to human eye.
The collection of the indices of eye location to be used calculating eye aspect ratio.
member.returns: Eye aspect ratio.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioHelenEyeBlinkDetector
member.summary: The eye blink detector for face landmark which was trained by helen dataset. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioHelenEyeBlinkDetector.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the threshold for left and right eyes.
member.param: The threshold to decide that left eye blinks or not.
The threshold to decide that right eye blinks or not.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioLargeEyeBlinkDetector
member.summary: The eye blink detector for . This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeAspectRatioLargeEyeBlinkDetector.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the threshold for left and right eyes.
member.param: The threshold to decide that left eye blinks or not.
The threshold to decide that right eye blinks or not.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeBlinkDetector
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to detect human eye's blink from face landmark.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.EyeBlinkDetector.RawDetect(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{FaceRecog.FacePart,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint}},System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Detects the values whether human eye's blink or not from face landmark.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
When this method returns, contains true, if the left eye blinks; otherwise, false.
When this method returns, contains true, if the right eye blinks; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.FaceDetector
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to detect face locations from image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.FaceDetector.RawDetect(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of face location correspond to all faces in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The number of times to up-sample the image when finding faces.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of face location correspond to all faces.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.FaceLandmarkDetector
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to detect face parts locations from face image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.FaceLandmarkDetector.RawDetect(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an object contains information of face parts corresponds to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An object contains information of face parts.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.FaceLandmarkDetector.RawGetLandmarks(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint[]})
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.param: The enumerable collection of face parts location.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.GenderEstimator
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to estimate human gender from face image.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Extensions.GenderEstimator.Labels
member.summary: Gets the collection of gender label this estimator returns in derived classes.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.GenderEstimator.RawPredict(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.GenderEstimator.RawPredictProbability(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns probabilities of gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.HeadPoseEstimator
member.summary: An abstract base class that provides functionality to estimate human head pose from face landmark.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.HeadPoseEstimator.RawPredict(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{FaceRecog.FacePart,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint}})
member.summary: Returns a head pose estimated from face parts locations.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.returns: A head pose estimated from face parts locations.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Extensions.HelenFaceLandmarkDetector
member.summary: The face landmark detector which was trained by helen dataset. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.HelenFaceLandmarkDetector.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the model file path that this detector uses.
member.param: The model file path that this detector uses.
member.exception: The model file is not found.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.HelenFaceLandmarkDetector.RawDetect(DlibDotNet.MatrixBase,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an object contains information of face parts corresponds to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The matrix contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An object contains information of face parts.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.HelenFaceLandmarkDetector.RawGetLandmarks(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint[]})
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.param: The enumerable collection of face parts location.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Extensions.HelenFaceLandmarkDetector.DisposeUnmanaged
member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.summary: The age estimator which was trained by Adience dataset. This class cannot be inherited.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the model file path that this estimator uses.

member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the model file path that this detector uses.

member.exception: The model file is not found.

member.summary: The head pose estimator which was trained by 300W-LP dataset. This class cannot be inherited.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the model files to estimate head pose.
member.param: The model file path to estimate roll angle.
The model file path to estimate pitch angle.
The model file path to estimate yaw angle.

member.summary: Returns a head pose estimated from face parts locations.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.returns: A head pose estimated from face parts locations.

member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.FaceEncoding
member.summary: Represents a feature data of face. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceEncoding.Size
member.summary: Gets the size of feature data.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceEncoding.GetRawEncoding
member.summary: Gets a feature data of face as raw format.
member.returns: A array that represents a feature data.
member.remarks: class supports serialization. This method is for interoperability between FaceRecog and dlib.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceEncoding.DisposeUnmanaged
member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceEncoding.GetObjectData(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Populates a with the data needed to serialize the target object.
member.param: The to populate with data.
The destination (see ) for this serialization.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.FacePart
member.summary: Specifies the part of face.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.Chin
member.summary: Specifies the chin.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.LeftEyebrow
member.summary: Specifies the left eyebrow.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.RightEyebrow
member.summary: Specifies the right eyebrow.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.NoseBridge
member.summary: Specifies the nose bridge.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.NoseTip
member.summary: Specifies the nose tip.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.LeftEye
member.summary: Specifies the left eye.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.RightEye
member.summary: Specifies the right eye.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.TopLip
member.summary: Specifies the top lip.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.BottomLip
member.summary: Specifies the bottom lip.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.FacePart.Nose
member.summary: Specifies the nose.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.FacePoint
member.summary: Represents an coordinate and index of face parts.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.#ctor(FaceRecog.Point,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified coordinates and index.
member.param: The coordinate of face parts.
The index of face parts.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FacePoint.Point
member.summary: Gets the coordinate of this .

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FacePoint.Index
member.summary: Gets the index of this .

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.Equals(FaceRecog.FacePoint)
member.summary: Compares two class for equality.
member.param: The point to compare to this instance.
member.returns: true if both class contain the same and values; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified is a and whether it contains the same data as this .
member.param: The to compare.
member.returns: true if is a and contains the same and values as this ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for this .
member.returns: The hash code for this class.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.op_Equality(FaceRecog.FacePoint,FaceRecog.FacePoint)
member.summary: Compares two class for equality.
member.param: The first class to compare.
The second class to compare.
member.returns: true if both the and of and are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FacePoint.op_Inequality(FaceRecog.FacePoint,FaceRecog.FacePoint)
member.summary: Compares two class for inequality.
member.param: The first class to compare.
The second class to compare.
member.returns: true if and have different or ; false if and have the same and .

member.name: T:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition
member.summary: Provides the method to find and recognize face methods. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the directory path that stores model files.
member.param: The directory path that stores model files.
member.exception: The model file is not found.
The specified directory path is not found.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.#ctor(FaceRecog.ModelParameter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the instance that contains model binary datum.
member.param: The instance that contains model binary datum.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomAgeEstimator
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom age estimator that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomEmotionEstimator
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom emotion estimator that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomEyeBlinkDetector
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom eye blink detector that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomGenderEstimator
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom gender estimator that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomFaceDetector
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom face detector that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomFaceLandmarkDetector
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom face landmark detector that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CustomHeadPoseEstimator
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom head pose estimator that user defined.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.InternalEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the character encoding to convert to array of for internal library.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.BatchFaceLocations(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.Image},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of array of bounding boxes of human faces in a image using the cnn face detector.
member.param: An enumerable collection of images.
The number of image looking for faces. Higher numbers find smaller faces.
The number of images to include in each GPU processing batch.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of array of found face locations.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CompareFace(FaceRecog.FaceEncoding,FaceRecog.FaceEncoding,System.Double)
member.summary: Compare a known face encoding against a candidate encoding to see if they match.
member.param: A known face encodings.
A single face encoding to compare against a known face encoding.
The distance between faces to consider it a match. Lower is more strict. The default value is 0.6.
member.returns: A True/False value indicating which known a face encoding matches the face encoding to check.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CompareFaces(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FaceEncoding},FaceRecog.FaceEncoding,System.Double)
member.summary: Compare an enumerable collection of face encodings against a candidate encoding to see if they match.
member.param: An enumerable collection of known face encodings.
A single face encoding to compare against the enumerable collection.
The distance between faces to consider it a match. Lower is more strict. The default value is 0.6.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of True/False values indicating which known face encodings match the face encoding to check.
member.exception: is disposed. Or contains disposed object.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new instance of the class.
member.param: The directory path that stores model files.
member.exception: The model file is not found.
The specified directory path is not found.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.Create(FaceRecog.ModelParameter)
member.summary: Create a new instance of the class.
member.param: The instance that contains model binary datum.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.CropFaces(FaceRecog.Image,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.Location})
member.summary: Crop a specified image with enumerable collection of face locations.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The enumerable collection of location rectangle for faces.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.EyeBlinkDetect(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{FaceRecog.FacePart,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint}},System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Detects the values whether human eye's blink or not from face landmark.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
When this method returns, contains true, if the left eye blinks; otherwise, false.
When this method returns, contains true, if the right eye blinks; otherwise, false.
member.exception: The custom eye blink detector is not ready.
This object or custom eye blink detector is disposed.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.FaceDistance(FaceRecog.FaceEncoding,FaceRecog.FaceEncoding)
member.summary: Compare a face encoding to a known face encoding and get a euclidean distance for comparison face.
member.param: The face encoding to compare.
The face encoding to compare against.
member.returns: The euclidean distance for comparison face. If 0, faces are completely equal.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.FaceDistances(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FaceEncoding},FaceRecog.FaceEncoding)
member.summary: Compare an enumerable collection of face encoding to a known face encoding and get an enumerable collection of euclidean distance for comparison face.
member.param: The enumerable collection of face encoding to compare.
The face encoding to compare against.
member.returns: The enumerable collection of euclidean distance for comparison face. If 0, faces are completely equal.
member.exception: is disposed. Or contains disposed object.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.FaceEncodings(FaceRecog.Image,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.Location},System.Int32,FaceRecog.PredictorModel,FaceRecog.Model)
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of face feature data corresponds to all faces in specified image.
member.param: The image contains faces. The image can contain multiple faces.
The enumerable collection of location rectangle for faces. If specified null, method will find face locations.
The number of times to re-sample the face when calculating encoding.
The dimension of vector which be returned from detector.
The model of face detector to detect in image. If is not null, this value is ignored.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of face feature data corresponds to all faces in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom face landmark detector is disposed.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.FaceLandmark(FaceRecog.Image,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.Location},FaceRecog.PredictorModel,FaceRecog.Model)
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc) for each face in the image.
member.param: The image contains faces. The image can contain multiple faces.
The enumerable collection of location rectangle for faces. If specified null, method will find face locations.
The dimension of vector which be returned from detector.
The model of face detector to detect in image. If is not null, this value is ignored.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.exception: or this object or custom face landmark detector is disposed.
The custom face landmark detector is not ready.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.FaceLocations(FaceRecog.Image,System.Int32,FaceRecog.Model)
member.summary: Returns an enumerable collection of face location correspond to all faces in specified image.
member.param: The image contains faces. The image can contain multiple faces.
The number of times to up-sample the image when finding faces.
The model of face detector to detect in image.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of face location correspond to all faces in specified image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.LoadFaceEncoding(System.Double[])
member.summary: Creates an from the array.
member.param: The array contains face encoding data.
member.returns: The this method creates.

member.summary: Creates an from the specified existing bitmap image.
member.param: The from which to create the new .
member.returns: The this method creates.

member.summary: Creates an from the array.
member.param: The array contains image data.
The number of rows in a image data.
The number of columns in a image data.
The stride width in bytes.
A image color mode.
member.returns: The this method creates.

member.summary: Creates an from the unmanaged memory pointer indicates array image data.
member.param: The unmanaged memory pointer indicates array image data.
The number of rows in a image data.
The number of columns in a image data.
The stride width in bytes.
A image color mode.
member.returns: The this method creates.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.LoadImageFile(System.String,FaceRecog.Mode)
member.summary: Creates an from the specified path.
member.param: A string that contains the path of the file from which to create the .
A image color mode.
member.returns: The this method creates.
member.exception: The specified path does not exist.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.PredictAge(FaceRecog.Image,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an index of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An index of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom age estimator is disposed.
The custom age estimator is not ready.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.PredictEmotion(FaceRecog.Image,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom emotion estimator is disposed.
The custom emotion estimator is not ready.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.PredictGender(FaceRecog.Image,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns an gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: An gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom gender estimator is disposed.
The custom gender estimator is not ready.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.PredictProbabilityAge(FaceRecog.Image,FaceRecog.Location)
member.summary: Returns probabilities of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of age group of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom age estimator is disposed.
The custom age estimator is not ready.

member.summary: Returns probabilities of emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of emotion of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.exception: or this object or custom emotion estimator is disposed.
The custom emotion estimator is not ready.

member.summary: Returns probabilities of gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.
member.param: The image contains a face.
The location rectangle for a face.
member.returns: Probabilities of gender of face image correspond to specified location in specified image.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.FaceRecognition.PredictHeadPose(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{FaceRecog.FacePart,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FaceRecog.FacePoint}})
member.summary: Returns a head pose estimated from face parts locations.
member.param: The dictionary of face parts locations (eyes, nose, etc).
member.returns: A head pose estimated from face parts locations.
member.exception: This object or custom head pose estimator is disposed.
The custom head pose estimator is not ready.

member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.ImageFormat
member.summary: Specifies the file format of the image.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.ImageFormat.Bmp
member.summary: Specifies that the bitmap (BMP) image format.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.ImageFormat.Jpeg
member.summary: Specifies that the Joint Photographic Experts Group (JPEG) image format.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.ImageFormat.Png
member.summary: Specifies that the W3C Portable Network Graphics (PNG) image format.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Location
member.summary: Describes the left, top, right and bottom location of a face. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Location.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure with the specified left, top, right and bottom.
member.param: The x-axis value of the left side of the rectangle of face.
The y-axis value of the top of the rectangle of face.
The x-axis value of the right side of the rectangle of face.
The y-axis value of the bottom of the rectangle of face.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Location.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure with the specified left, top, right, bottom and confidence.
member.param: The x-axis value of the left side of the rectangle of face.
The y-axis value of the top of the rectangle of face.
The x-axis value of the right side of the rectangle of face.
The y-axis value of the bottom of the rectangle of face.
The confidence of detected face.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Location.#ctor(DlibDotNet.Rectangle,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure with the specified rectangle and confidence.
member.param: The rectangle of face.
The confidence of detected face.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Location.#ctor(FaceRecog.Location,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure with the specified location and confidence.
member.param: The location of face.
The confidence of detected face.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Location.Bottom
member.summary: Gets the y-axis value of the bottom of the rectangle of face.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Location.Confidence
member.summary: Gets the confidence of detected face.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Location.Left
member.summary: Gets the x-axis value of the left side of the rectangle of face.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Location.Right
member.summary: Gets the x-axis value of the right side of the rectangle of face.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Location.Top
member.summary: Gets the y-axis value of the top of the rectangle of face.

member.summary: Compares two class for equality.
member.param: The face location to compare to this instance.

The second class to compare.

member.summary: Compares two class for inequality.
member.param: The first class to compare.
The second class to compare.
member.returns: true if and have different , , or coordinates; false if and have the same , , and face location.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Mode
member.summary: Specifies the image mode.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.Mode.Rgb
member.summary: Specifies that the rgb (8-bit Red, Green and Blue, 3 channels) image mode.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.Mode.Greyscale
member.summary: Specifies that the greyscale image mode.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Model
member.summary: Specifies the model of face detector.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.Model.Hog
member.summary: Specifies that the model is HOG (Histograms of Oriented Gradients) based face detector.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.Model.Cnn
member.summary: Specifies that the model is CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) based face detector.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.Model.Custom
member.summary: Specifies that the custom face detector.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.ModelParameter
member.summary: Describes the model binary datum. This class cannot be inherited.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.ModelParameter.PosePredictor68FaceLandmarksModel
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary data of model for 68 points face landmarks.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.ModelParameter.PosePredictor5FaceLandmarksModel
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary data of model for 5 points face landmarks.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.ModelParameter.FaceRecognitionModel
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary data of model for face encoding.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.ModelParameter.CnnFaceDetectorModel
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary data of model for face detector by using CNN.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.Point
member.summary: Represents an ordered pair of integer x- and y-coordinates that defines a point in a two-dimensional plane.

member.name: M:FaceRecog.Point.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure with the specified coordinates.
member.param: The horizontal position of the point.
The vertical position of the point.

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Point.X
member.summary: Gets the x-coordinate of this .

member.name: P:FaceRecog.Point.Y
member.summary: Gets the y-coordinate of this .

member.summary: Compares two structures for equality.
member.param: The point to compare to this instance.
member.returns: true if both structures contain the same and values; otherwise, false.

member.returns: true if is a and contains the same and values as this ; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Compares two structures for inequality.
member.param: The first structure to compare.
The second structure to compare.
member.returns: true if and have different or coordinates; false if and have the same and coordinates.

member.name: T:FaceRecog.PredictorModel
member.summary: Specifies the dimension of vector which be returned from detector.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.PredictorModel.Large
member.summary: Specifies that the large scale detector. The detector returns 68 points for represent face.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.PredictorModel.Small
member.summary: Specifies that the small scale detector. The detector returns 5 points for represent face.

member.name: F:FaceRecog.PredictorModel.Custom
member.summary: Specifies that the custom detector.
